heading: Leasing surplus Federal property
label: 11189 Leasing surplus Federal property
text: The Administrator may receive surplus Federal property (including facilities) and may lease such property to States and units of general local government for use in or as facilities for juvenile offenders, or for use in or as facilities for delinquency prevention and treatment activities.
